Module 11 - Lesson 1
Why You Need To Test:
• Testing Is What Allows You To Scientifically And
Methodically Improve The Results You’re Getting From
Your Marketing Funnel!
• Without Testing, You Have No Way Of Knowing What
Improves Results And What Suppresses Results!
• Every Tweak Or Change You Make Must Be Driven By
Testing Data!
• There Is No Place For Assumptions And Guesses In
Direct Response Marketing

-- 1 of 1 --
